summary:
Acid etching mainly removes the smear layer and exposes collagen, enhancing bond strength—options A, C, E describe accurate impacts. Only D inaccurately states this process affects surface tension significantly. 
Acid etching improves dental restoration success via structural preparation more so than direct manipulation of surface tension.
